title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
US-Iran ceasefire collapse (Jul 9): Trump declared truce over; ~90 US strikes on Iran overnight, Iran retaliating with missiles/drones in Gulf. Hormuz closure risk live. WTI ~$75/bbl.
Jobless Claims (wk Jul 4): 215k vs 218k est — 6-week low, labor market holding firm.
Crypto: BTC -1.7% to $62,375; TOTAL mkt cap -2.1% to $2.21T. Fear & Greed: 22 (Extreme Fear).
